preferredDeck: Facebook sync now reports unusable scrape results as sync issues and adds diagnostics for the next dev soak.
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Facebook feed sync now reports unusable raw scrape results as failures instead of healthy zero-post syncs.
The scrape log now exposes extraction strategy, rejection counts, normalization counts, and existing-item counts.
editorialNotes: Use the Facebook sync repair as the headline for v26.5.3110-dev.
